description: sunglasses by MTV. These shades have shatter-proof lenses designed to protect your eyes from glass shards in case of impact. Crafted with a wear-everywhere appeal, the silhouetting and design details in this pair epitomize a downtown, street style cool.This set of glasses comes in a sturdy fibre case with felt lining for easy and delicate storage.Lens size: 60 mmLens colour: BlackFrame colour: BlackFitted with shatter-proof polycarbonate lenses that filter out 100% UVA and UVB raysProtection from bright sunshineStylised frame in a classic design with an oval lens for absolute comfort and durabilityFixed plastic grips to hold the glasses in place, ensuring there is no friction with the skinCareRemove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth providedRemove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleanerDo not use your fingers on such stainsDo not place glasses on uneven surface or heated areas like the dashboard of a car
